headline: Built for Close
subheadline: AI-powered sales tools to boost customer acquisition for live event organizers facing market disruptions

challenges.title: Event Cancellations
challenges.desc: Live events often face sudden cancellations, disrupting revenue for Close's platform. This forces organizers to pivot quickly, straining their sales strategies. Funding challenges from cancelled VC deals add pressure to maintain operations.

challenges.title: Funding Shortfalls
challenges.desc: Close's early-stage VC deal was cancelled, limiting capital for growth. This impacts their ability to invest in sales tools, making it hard to compete in a niche market. Organizers rely on stable funding to scale personalized content offerings.

challenges.title: Customer Acquisition
challenges.desc: In a disrupted event market, Close struggles to attract new users amid economic uncertainty. Directors like Nick prioritize data-driven strategies, but inconsistent leads hinder growth. This affects their focus on connecting brands with audiences effectively.

challenges.title: Scaling Costs
challenges.desc: Close aims to scale without overpaying for enterprise tools, but their small team of 15 faces resource constraints. This makes it challenging to automate sales processes during event peaks. Balancing efficiency and costs is key for their B2B SaaS model.

deliverables.title: AI Lead Gen System
deliverables.desc: Builds automated lead generation integrated with Close's CRM to target event organizers, reducing acquisition costs

deliverables.title: Personalized Content Engine
deliverables.desc: Creates AI-driven content recommendations that integrate with their mobile platform, enhancing user engagement for events

deliverables.title: Revenue Optimization Tool
deliverables.desc: Develops a system to track and optimize sales pipelines amid disruptions, linking directly to their existing tools for real-time insights

deliverables.title: Funding Resilience Framework
deliverables.desc: Establishes a scalable infrastructure for managing financial risks, integrating with their operations to support growth despite VC challenges

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Research Close's sales pain points and outline a customized AI strategy

engagementSteps.title: Development Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Build and test the AI infrastructure tailored to their event-focused CRM

engagementSteps.title: Launch Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Integrate the new systems and train the team for immediate use

faqItems.question: What is this service?
faqItems.answer: It's a customized AI sales infrastructure for Close to improve efficiency.

faqItems.question: How does it integrate with our CRM?
faqItems.answer: It seamlessly connects with Close's platform for enhanced data flow.

faqItems.question: What are the costs?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on scope; we align with your budget for event organizers.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typically 3 months, starting with assessment and ending with launch.

faqItems.question: Is it scalable for our team size?
faqItems.answer: Yes, designed for small teams like Close's 15 employees to grow as needed.

faqItems.question: What results can we expect?
faqItems.answer: Expect better lead generation and revenue growth based on your market challenges.

stackItems.name: Close CRM
stackItems.role: Manages sales communications and pipelines for event organizers

stackItems.name: Zapier
stackItems.role: Automates workflows between Close and other tools for efficiency

stackItems.name: Google Analytics
stackItems.role: Tracks user engagement and sales data for Close's platform

stackItems.name: Slack
stackItems.role: Facilitates team communication during sales strategy development

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Supports marketing automation to complement Close's customer acquisition efforts
